name: GetLocalizedResource
description: Looks up a translation string by ResourceName key and LanguageId. Returns the ResourceName itself (not empty string) if no match is found — fail-open by design.
caching: Results cached by key 'sms.lsr.{languageId}-{UPPER(resourceKey)}'. Cache invalidated on any write via RemoveByPattern('sms.lsr.').
fallback: Returns resourceKey as-is when not found. Never returns null or empty.

name: GetLocalizedResourceWithParams
description: Like B001 but performs token replacement in the result. Tokens are in format '{someKey}'. Runs ForEach Replace on the resolved string.
note: No escaping of token values — if a value contains a '{anotherKey}' pattern, it would be double-replaced. Not observed as a bug in practice.

name: InsertLocaleStringResource
description: When a new resource key is added, the service auto-creates rows for ALL languages. The provided row gets the real value; all other language rows get 'Missing Translation' as placeholder.
invariant: A ResourceName always exists for every active language. No orphan rows.
cache_invalidation: Clears full localization cache pattern on insert.

name: GetIncomplete
description: Returns all LocaleStringResource rows where any language version of the ResourceName has ResourceValue = 'Missing Translation'. Shows all language versions of that key, not just the missing one.
sql_pattern: CTE: SELECT ResourceName FROM LocaleStringResources WHERE ResourceValue = 'Missing Translation'. Main: SELECT all rows WHERE ResourceName IN that CTE.

name: GetLanguageLookup
description: Returns all resources for a language as an ILookup keyed by UPPER(ResourceName). Used for bulk lookups where many keys need resolving without individual DB roundtrips.

name: DateTimeFormatting
description: Localized date/datetime formatting using resource keys stored in DB. Format strings are stored as LocaleStringResources, not hardcoded.
source: LocalizationService.ToShortDateString / ToDateTimeString / ToDateTimeWithTimeString / LocalDateFormat / LocalDateTimeFormat / DateTimeWithSecondsFormat
note: Format strings are standard .NET DateTime format patterns (e.g. 'dd-MM-yyyy'). Stored per language, enabling locale-appropriate formatting without code changes.

name: GetAllLanguages
description: Returns all Language rows. Cached for 10 hours (CacheTimeout.TenHours). Used by both LanguageService and internally by LocalizationService.InsertLocaleStringResource to enumerate languages.

name: BulkMerge (import)
description: Import from JSON file: deserializes LocaleStringResourceExportReadModel list and performs bulk UPSERT via Z.Dapper.Plus with key (LanguageId, ResourceName). Existing rows are updated; new rows inserted.

name: Export to JSON
description: Serializes all LocaleStringResources to a JSON file via async query. Output includes LanguageId, ResourceName, ResourceValue. Id is excluded.

name: GetResourcesJson — public translation bootstrap endpoint
description: Returns ALL localized resources for a given languageId as a flat JSON object keyed by UPPER(ResourceName). This is the endpoint the Angular frontend calls at bootstrap via BiHttpTranslateLoader. AllowAnonymous — required because it is also used by iFrame modules that may not have a bearer token.
caller: BiHttpTranslateLoader.getTranslation(lang) — maps Angular lang code (e.g. 'da', 'sv') to BiCountryId and calls this endpoint
processing: Calls _localizationService.GetAll(languageId), builds Dictionary<string,string>, returns Ok(dict). Keys are upper-cased to match BiTranslateService convention.
note: No caching at HTTP level — caching is done inside LocalizationService.GetAll(). Duplicate key guard: only first occurrence added (ResourceName uniqueness maintained by DB unique index, so duplicates should not occur).

name: Resources — paginated admin search
description: Returns paginated, filterable list of LanguageResourceModel for a given language. Supports searching by ResourceName substring and ResourceValue substring. Supports 'OnlyIncomplete' flag to show only keys with 'Missing Translation' value.
processing: Queries all resources for language, applies optional text filters in-memory, paginates via Paginate(query) extension method. Returns DataTableResultModel<LanguageResourceModel> with Total and Data.

name: InsertLocalizedResource — admin create
description: Creates a new LocaleStringResource for a specific language. Validates no existing resource with same ResourceName exists (case-insensitive check). After insert, auto-creates placeholder 'Missing Translation' rows for all other languages (via LocalizationService.InsertLocaleStringResource invariant B003).
cache_effect: Clears full 'sms.lsr.' cache pattern on insert.

name: UpdateLocalizedResource — admin edit
description: Updates an existing LocaleStringResource by Id. Validates id != 0, ResourceName and ResourceValue not empty, resource exists. Updates all three fields (ResourceName, ResourceValue, LanguageId).
source: CommonController.UpdateLocalizedResource(int id, string resourceName, string resourceValue, int languageId)
cache_effect: Clears full 'sms.lsr.' cache pattern on update.
known_bug: GAP_005 — caller's tap() for frontend cache update hardcodes 'da'/'se' instead of using getLanguageCodeByLanguageId()

name: DeleteLocalizedResource — admin delete
description: Deletes a LocaleStringResource by Id. Validates id != 0 and resource exists. NOTE: only deletes the single language row — does NOT delete all language versions of the same ResourceName. This can leave orphan 'Missing Translation' rows for other languages.
note: UI confirms deletion with dialog before calling this endpoint.

name: DownloadResourcesExcel — export to spreadsheet
description: Exports all LocaleStringResources (or optionally a single language) as an Excel file. Uses FormattedExcelReportDownloader<TranslationRecord>. File name is localized via GetLocalizedResource('superAdministration.Translations.Translations').
